ddls:
CREATE TABLE "companies" (
  "company_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each company */,
  "symbol" TEXT /* Stock symbol of the company */,
  "company_name" TEXT /* Name of the company */,
  "exchange_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the stock exchange where the company is listed */,
  "industry_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the industry the company belongs to */,
  "sector_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the sector the company belongs to */,
  "ipo_date" TEXT /* Date of the company's initial public offering (IPO) */,
  "website" TEXT /* URL to the company's official website */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the company */,
  "market_cap" TEXT /* Market capitalization of the company */,
  "ceo" TEXT /* Name of the CEO */,
  "headquarters" TEXT /* Location of the company's headquarters */,
  "employee_count" INTEGER /* Number of employees */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the company's data */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the company is currently active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("company_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_companies_sector_id FOREIGN KEY ("sector_id") REFERENCES sectors ("sector_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_companies_industry_id FOREIGN KEY ("industry_id") REFERENCES industries ("industry_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_companies_exchange_id FOREIGN KEY ("exchange_id") REFERENCES exchanges ("exchange_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "exchanges" (
  "exchange_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each exchange */,
  "exchange_name" TEXT /* Name of the stock exchange */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the stock exchange */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the exchange */,
  "founded_date" TEXT /* Date when the exchange was founded */,
  "website" TEXT /* URL to the exchange's official website */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the exchange's data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("exchange_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "industries" (
  "industry_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each industry */,
  "industry_name" TEXT /* Name of the industry */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the industry */,
  "parent_industry_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the parent industry (for hierarchical classification) */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the industry's data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("industry_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_industries_parent_industry_id FOREIGN KEY ("parent_industry_id") REFERENCES industries ("industry_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sectors" (
  "sector_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sector */,
  "sector_name" TEXT /* Name of the sector */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the sector */,
  "parent_sector_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the parent sector (for hierarchical classification) */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the sector's data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sector_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sectors_parent_sector_id FOREIGN KEY ("parent_sector_id") REFERENCES sectors ("sector_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stock_prices" (
  "price_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stock price entry */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the company whose stock price is being recorded */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the stock price entry */,
  "open_price" REAL /* Opening price of the stock on the given date */,
  "high_price" REAL /* Highest price of the stock on the given date */,
  "low_price" REAL /* Lowest price of the stock on the given date */,
  "close_price" REAL /* Closing price of the stock on the given date */,
  "volume" INTEGER /* Volume of shares traded on the given date */,
  "pre_market_price" REAL /* Pre-market price of the stock */,
  "post_market_price" REAL /* Post-market price of the stock */,
  "adjusted_close_price" REAL /* Adjusted closing price of the stock */,
  "dividend_amount" REAL /* Dividend amount paid on the given date */,
  "split_ratio" REAL /* Split ratio if a stock split occurred on the given date */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the stock price data (e.g., API, data feed) */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the stock price data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("price_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stock_prices_company_id FOREIGN KEY ("company_id") REFERENCES companies ("company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., analyst, investor, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for user authentication */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* User's phone number for contact */,
  "address" TEXT /* User's physical address */,
  "date_joined" TEXT /* Date when the user joined the platform */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user account is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
